items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for no-show handling being different from direct bookings.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'No-show handling different from direct bookings', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for different handling of no-shows, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence of this functionality being tested or validated. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
